results.rendered_html: praṇāyya (wie eben) adj. zu dem man sich hingezogen fühlt: antevāsin  Ind. St. 1,258 . = priya lieb  VOP.  praṇāyyaḥ sādhvaninditaḥ tadellos  TRIK. 3,1,26 . verworfen (asaṃmatau, asaṃmata)  P. 3,1,128 .  VOP. 26,11 .  H. 491 . an. 3,493 .  MED. y. 92 .  HALĀY. 2,211 . jana  BHAṬṬ. 6,66 . = kāmavivarjita, abhilāṣavivarjita frei von Verlangen  H. an.   MED.

results.rendered_html:
praṇāyya a.
1 Dear, beloved.
2 Upright, honest, straight-forward.
3 Disliked, disapproved;  Bk. 6. 66. 
4 Free from passion, indifferent to worldly attachments (virakta).
